# Haylo — Local Marketing for Sunshine Coast Small Businesses

> Haylo is a local marketing agency based on the Sunshine Coast, QLD, Australia. We help small and trades businesses get found on Google Maps, generate more 5-star reviews, and grow their local online presence. Our core focus is Google Business Profile management, local SEO, Facebook marketing, and review generation.

## About Haylo

Haylo was founded to give Sunshine Coast small businesses — especially tradies, cleaners, and home service providers — access to the kind of local marketing that actually drives enquiries. We work with businesses that rely on local customers finding them online, whether through Google Maps, Google Search, or Facebook.

Our approach is hands-on and straightforward: we manage and optimise your Google Business Profile, build a steady stream of genuine customer reviews, keep your Facebook presence active, and report on what is working.

## Services

- **Google Business Profile Management** — Full setup, optimisation, and ongoing management of your GBP listing to rank higher in Google Maps and local search results.
- **Review Generation** — Automated systems to consistently collect 5-star reviews from happy customers, improving trust and local rankings.
- **Facebook Page Management** — Content creation and page management to keep your business visible and professional on Facebook.
- **Local SEO Reporting** — Clear monthly reporting on rankings, visibility, and leads so you always know what is working.
- **Free Google Business Profile Audit** — A no-obligation audit of your current GBP listing identifying quick wins and missed opportunities.

## Who We Help

- Tradies (plumbers, electricians, roofers, tilers, concreters, painters, landscapers)
- Cleaning businesses
- Home service providers
- Health and wellness businesses
- Auto and mechanical workshops
- Garden and outdoor services

## Service Areas

Sunshine Coast, QLD — including Maroochydore, Caloundra, Noosa, Buderim, and surrounding suburbs.

## Pricing

Haylo offers monthly management packages starting from $297/month. A free audit is available with no obligation.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What does Haylo do?**
Haylo manages local online marketing for small businesses on the Sunshine Coast. This includes Google Business Profile optimisation, review generation, Facebook management, and local SEO reporting.

**How much does Haylo cost?**
Monthly management packages start from $297/month. A free Google Business Profile audit is available with no obligation to sign up.

**What areas does Haylo service?**
Haylo primarily services the Sunshine Coast, QLD, including Maroochydore, Caloundra, Noosa, Buderim, and surrounding areas.

**How long does it take to see results?**
Most clients start seeing improvements in their Google Maps visibility within 4-8 weeks of their profile being optimised and reviews beginning to come in.

**Do I need a website to work with Haylo?**
No. Haylo focuses on your Google Business Profile and other platforms that drive local visibility. A website is not required to get started.

**What is a Google Business Profile?**
A Google Business Profile (formerly Google My Business) is the listing that appears when someone searches for your business or a service you offer on Google. It controls your Google Maps ranking and first impressions for most local customers.

**Can Haylo help if my Google Business Profile has been suspended?**
Yes. Haylo has experience reinstating suspended Google Business Profiles and resolving account issues.
